C. Common Ownership Exception to Partial Payment Adjustment 

The partial payment adjustment does not apply in situations of transfers among HHAs of 
common ownership. Those situations would be considered services provided under 
arrangement on behalf of the originating HHA by the receiving HHA with the ownership 
interest until the end of the 30-day period. The common ownership
